>更新时间：2026.07.11

# 微信支付 - 微信支付分停车服务（普通服务商）文档索引

> 微信支付分停车服务基于用户微信账户和车牌的绑定关系，依托微信支付分，在车辆离场时对绑定账户自动扣费。用户一次开通，全国支付分停车场均可使用。提升车场通行效率与用户体验，减少离场拥堵。

## 接入指引
- [产品介绍](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085549.md)
- [常见问题](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4016183529.md)
- [开发指引](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085711.md)
- [开发接入准备](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085632.md)
- [错误码](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4020807412.md)

## API 列表
### 停车入场
- [创建停车入场](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012533994.md)
- [停车入场状态变更通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085798.md)
### 服务
- [查询车牌服务开通信息](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534183.md)
- [小程序调起微信支付分停车服务开通页](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085969.md)
- [H5调起微信支付分停车服务开通页](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012085997.md)
- [App拉起微信支付分停车服务开通页](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012086028.md)
### 扣费受理
- [查询订单](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534441.md)
- [扣费受理](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534427.md)
- [订单支付结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012086059.md)
### 还款
- [微信垫资还款](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012086207.md)
### 退款
- [退款申请](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760545.md)
- [退款结果通知](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012086319.md)
- [查询单笔退款（通过商户退款单号）](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760554.md)

## 请求示例
- [创建停车入场 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012533994-curl.md)
- [创建停车入场 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012533994-java.md)
- [创建停车入场 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012533994-go.md)
- [扣费受理 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534427-curl.md)
- [扣费受理 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534427-java.md)
- [扣费受理 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534427-go.md)
- [查询单笔退款（通过商户退款单号） - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760554-curl.md)
- [查询单笔退款（通过商户退款单号） - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760554-java.md)
- [查询单笔退款（通过商户退款单号） - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760554-go.md)
- [查询订单 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534441-curl.md)
- [查询订单 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534441-java.md)
- [查询订单 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534441-go.md)
- [查询车牌服务开通信息 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534183-curl.md)
- [查询车牌服务开通信息 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534183-java.md)
- [查询车牌服务开通信息 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012534183-go.md)
- [退款申请 - curl 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760545-curl.md)
- [退款申请 - Java 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760545-java.md)
- [退款申请 - Go 示例](https://pay.weixin.qq.com/doc/v3/partner/4012760545-go.md)
